---
description: "Use after product and architecture discovery to propose Caracal SDK integration points and get user confirmation before implementation."
---
# Integration Planning

Before implementation, provide:

### Product Understanding

- product summary
- user workflow summary

### Architecture Understanding

- architecture summary
- current auth and credential flow
- integration opportunities

### Proposed Integration

- recommended integration points
- optional integration points
- expected changes
- expected benefits
- what should remain unchanged

Ask for user confirmation before editing code.
